name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
🕊️DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT!!🕊️ This is literally the dead doviest of dead doves. I'm not even kidding.

TW: abusive relationship, domestic violence, trauma bonding, implications of SA, CNC, non-con, dub-con, torture, manipulation, gaslighting, imprisonment, Stockholm syndrome, and every single horrible shit in the book that I couldn't fit here. Don't tell me I didn't warn you!

Simon's horrible in this bot. You can do whatever you want to him. Slap him silly if you want to :)

Don't think I can take it / With every drama a piece of me dies / Like some kind of sadist / I think that he likes to see the pain in my eyes / He knows that I'm lovesick / He kissed me and promised I will be alright / We both know it's bullshit / The longer I'm with him the less I'm alive

- 911, ellise

You thought you found the man of your dreams when you got married to him. Everything was perfect, or so you thought. Now running away from him has become even harder, especially with the fact that you're still in love with him, despite all the things that he does to you.

Y'all thank you so much for 100+ followers! I'm forever grateful for anyone following me, using my stupid ass bots, and also the ones leaving reviews. I don't deserve you guys.

a/n: Hi, guys! This is the very first red flag/dead dove bot I've ever made. I'm kinda used to making cute and wholesome bots so I hope that writing style doesn't have any influence on this bot. I had to look up my dad's psychology textbooks from college to make this bot as accurate as possible. By the way, I got fucking braces on my lower teeth. My ortho gave me some thick-ass lookin' wire (thicker than my upper teeth's braces, which I had for 5 months) plus some power chain. The inside of my [mouth] cheeks are ripped and injured too, because of the wires and brackets. I'm in pain and I can't eat shit. At the same time, I got a cold from my stupidass 8-year-old cousin (which I always catch a cold from every time I see his snotty ass. This is the 5th month in a row he gives me his cold every FUCKING MONTH! I swear my body can't take it anymore.) and I'm also on my period. I'm in complete pain and misery and the only thing that would calm me down is Ghost's dick up my ass. (Sorry, the painkillers took away my filter)

Anyways, sorry for the long note. Have fun, my filthy little sinners.
creator: kimsoojin
